Design System v0.27.0
Overview Foundations

Layout

  • App-Shell Layout-Primitive
  • Card Component
  • Divider Component
  • List-Row Component
  • Panel-List Component
  • Section Component

Form

  • Button Component
  • Checkbox + Radio Components
  • Combobox Component
  • Date-Input Component
  • Field Component
  • File-Upload Component
  • OTP Input — One-Time Password / Multi-Field-Code
  • Range-Slider Component
  • Search-Input Component
  • Segmented Control
  • Select Component
  • Slider Component
  • Switch Component

Feedback

  • Alert Component
  • Banner Component
  • Callout Component
  • Empty-State Component
  • Progress Component
  • Skeleton Loader
  • Spinner Component
  • Toast / Notification Component

Navigation

  • Accordion Component
  • Back-to-Top Button
  • Breadcrumbs Component
  • Nav Component
  • Pagination Component
  • Scroll-Spy Navigation
  • Steps Component
  • Tabs Component
  • Tree Component

Overlay

  • Command Palette
  • Drawer Component
  • Hover-Card — Rich Preview on Hover
  • Modal Component
  • Popover Component
  • Tooltip Component

Data Display

  • Avatar Component
  • Avatar-Stack Component
  • Badge Component
  • Chart Container
  • CodeBlock Component
  • Funnel Component
  • Stat Component
  • Table Component
  • Tag Component
  • Timeline Component
  • Trend Component

Primitive

  • Chevron Component
  • Copy Button — Copy-to-Clipboard
  • KBD — Keyboard Shortcut Display
  • Theme Toggle — Light/Dark Mode Switch
Themes Recipes
Layout
  • App-Shell Layout-Primitive
  • Card Component
  • Divider Component
  • List-Row Component
  • Panel-List Component
  • Section Component
Form
  • Button Component
  • Checkbox + Radio Components
  • Combobox Component
  • Date-Input Component
  • Field Component
  • File-Upload Component
  • OTP Input — One-Time Password / Multi-Field-Code

  • Search-Input Component
  • Segmented Control
  • Select Component
  • Slider Component
  • Switch Component
Feedback
  • Alert Component

  • Callout Component

  • Progress Component

  • Toast / Notification Component

  • Command Palette
  • Drawer Component
  • Hover-Card — Rich Preview on Hover
  • Modal Component
  • Popover Component
  • Tooltip Component
Data Display
  • Avatar Component
  • Avatar-Stack Component
  • Badge Component
  • Chart Container
  • CodeBlock Component
  • Funnel Component
  • Stat Component
  • Table Component
  • Tag Component
  • Timeline Component
  • Trend Component
Primitive
  • Chevron Component
  • Copy Button — Copy-to-Clipboard
  • KBD — Keyboard Shortcut Display
  • Theme Toggle — Light/Dark Mode Switch
Data Display

Avatar Component

Runder Kreis mit Initialen oder Bild. Für Staff, Kunden, User-Chips.

Beispiele

AB

Mit Bild

Tone-Übersicht

Dieselbe Komponente unter allen 6 Tones. Klick auf eine Kachel um die ganze Seite auf diesen Tone zu schalten.

trust
AB
playful
AB
premium
AB
industrial
AB
modern
AB
minimal
AB

Token-Contract

TokenStatusNotiz
--avatar-size Optional —
--avatar-bg Optional —
--avatar-fg Optional —
--avatar-radius Optional —
--avatar-ring Optional —

Modifier

  • .avatar--sm — / --lg / --xl Größen
  • .avatar--square — eckig (für Logos)
  • .avatar--c0 — … .avatar--c7 Farbpalette (Staff-Color-Index)
  • .avatar--ring — mit Outline-Ring (Online-Indikator)

Modifier-Vorschau

Jeder Modifier auf das Basis-Markup angewandt — visueller Beweis, dass die Klasse funktioniert.

.avatar--sm Größen
AB
.avatar--lg Größen
AB
.avatar--xl Größen
AB
.avatar--square eckig (für Logos)
AB
.avatar--c0 … .avatar--c7 Farbpalette (Staff-Color-Index)
AB
.avatar--ring mit Outline-Ring (Online-Indikator)
AB
Source-CSS ansehen
